subject: fix(ui): split modal backdrop (z-40) and modal (z-60) into adjacent siblings
body:
The previous commit placed the combined backdrop+modal div at z-60,
violating the glow-props Z_INDEX_SCALE rule: "Backdrop is always z-40
regardless of what it's behind." This matters for predictability — any
future component relying on "backdrop is at 40" would be wrong.

Split both modals (Save Modal, Comparison View) into:
- Backdrop div: fixed inset-0, bg-background/*, z-40, click-to-close
- Modal container div: fixed inset-0, z-60, pointer-events-none
- Modal card: pointer-events-auto (receives clicks through the container)

Tags: ui, z-index, infrastructure
Complexity: 2
Urgency: 2
Impact: infrastructure
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: z-index-scale
Semver: patch
